title: dryopteris podophylla
intro: Dryopteris podophylla, also known as American mandrake or Eeastern American golden-rod fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the Dryopteris genus of ferns. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-tumor activities. The health benefits of Dryopteris podophylla include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and alleviate digestive issues. Dryopteris podophylla can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or powder, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of health conditions.
